# Prefrontal Club
> Prefrontal Club provides a structured learning path focused on ADHD, executive function, and rational practice.

## Primary Site
- https://mumega.com/pref

## Key Pages
- / : Fractal Learning Path overview and core offerings.
- /offer : Pricing tiers and enrollment call to action.
- /journal : Journal categories across science, art, music, and cinema.
- /contact : Contact form for starting the path.

## Content Notes
- Page content lives in `cms/content/` as MDX with frontmatter metadata.
- Reusable sections are in `cms/snippets/`.
